Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all cases
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that occurs after SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment compared to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is not followed by any reviewer assignment activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases where 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' does not happen

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants that end with SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Reject' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurring before any plagiarism-related activity (e.g., Plagiarism Originality Report Completed)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment relative to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting AE Assignment appears exactly once
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in variants leading to acceptance (e.g., ending with RW-EIC Accept or SW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is immediately preceded by Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment compared to SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that occurs in the first 24 hours after manuscript submission
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in cases involving Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment followed within three days by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across different case types (e.g., challenge papers vs. regular submissions, inferred from activity patterns like SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers Challenge Paper' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is never succeeded by any reviewer response (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases where 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' does not happen

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to total number of “awaiting”-type activities (e.g., SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion, SW-Awaiting EIC Decision, etc.)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases
